016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.rest.client.classic.remote;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.ClassUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.CollectionUtils.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
022import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils.*;
023import static org.apache.juneau.http.classic.HttpHeaders.*;
024
025import java.lang.reflect.*;
026import java.util.*;
027
028import org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect.*;
029import org.apache.juneau.commons.svl.*;
030import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.*;
031import org.apache.juneau.http.remote.*;
032
033/**
034 * Contains the meta-data about a REST proxy class.
035 *
036 * <p>
037 * Captures the information in {@link Remote @Remote} and {@link RemoteOp @RemoteOp} annotations for
038 * caching and reuse.
039 *
040 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
041 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/RestProxies">REST Proxy Basics</a>
042 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/JuneauRestClient">juneau-rest-client Basics</a>
043 * </ul>
044 */
045public class RemoteMeta {
046
047   private static String resolve(String s) {
048      return VarResolver.DEFAULT.resolve(s);
049   }
050
051   private final Map<Method,RemoteOperationMeta> operations;
052
053   private final HeaderList headers;
054
055   /**
056    * Constructor.
057    *
058    * @param c The interface class annotated with a {@link Remote @Remote} annotation (optional).
059    */
060   @SuppressWarnings({
061      "java:S3776" // Cognitive complexity acceptable for remote interface metadata construction dispatch
062   })
063   public RemoteMeta(Class<?> c) {
064      var path = "";
065
066      var ci = ClassInfo.of(c);
067      var remotes = rstream(ci.getAnnotations(Remote.class).toList()).map(AnnotationInfo::inner).toList();
068
069      var versionHeader = "Client-Version";
070      String clientVersion = null;
071      var headers2 = HeaderList.create().resolving();
072
073      for (var r : remotes) {
074         if (ine(r.path()))
075            path = trimSlashes(resolve(r.path()));
076         else if (ine(r.value()))
077            path = trimSlashes(resolve(r.value()));
078         for (var h : r.headers())
079            headers2.append(stringHeader(resolve(h)));
080         if (ine(r.version()))
081            clientVersion = resolve(r.version());
082         if (ine(r.versionHeader()))
083            versionHeader = resolve(r.versionHeader());
084         if (isNotVoid(r.headerList()) && HeaderList.class.isAssignableFrom(r.headerList())) {
085            try {
086               headers2.append(((HeaderList) r.headerList().getDeclaredConstructor().newInstance()).getAll());
087            } catch (Exception e) {
088               throw rex(e, "Could not instantiate HeaderSupplier class");
089            }
090         }
091      }
092
093      if (nn(clientVersion))
094         headers2.append(stringHeader(versionHeader, clientVersion));
095
096      Map<Method,RemoteOperationMeta> operations2 = map();
097      var path2 = path;
098      ci.getPublicMethods().forEach(x -> operations2.put(x.inner(), new RemoteOperationMeta(path2, x.inner(), "GET")));
099
100      this.operations = u(operations2);
101      this.headers = headers2;
102   }
103
104   /**
105    * Returns the headers to set on all requests.
106    *
107    * @return The headers to set on all requests.
108    */
109   public HeaderList getHeaders() { return headers; }
110
111   /**
112    * Returns the metadata about the specified operation on this resource proxy.
113    *
114    * @param m The method to look up.
115    * @return Metadata about the method or <jk>null</jk> if no metadata was found.
116    */
117   public RemoteOperationMeta getOperationMeta(Method m) {
118      return operations.get(m);
119   }
120}
